case_title: WONG, FOK LOI GOLDEN STAR MUSIC CO. VS CHAN, SAU KING ROMANTIC BEAUTY SALON

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, FOK LOI  GOLDEN STAR MUSIC CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAN, SAU KING  ROMANTIC BEAUTY SALON $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,050.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, SAU KING  ROMANTIC BEAUTY SALON
PLTF DECL OF DEFT'S NEW ADDRESS, FILED.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF FEB-08-2005, GRANTED

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-13-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-15-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 MOTION GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 116.740(A) WHICH REQUIRES THAT THE MOTION BE ACCOMPANIED BY A SUPPORTING DECLARATION & SHALL BE FILED WITHIN 180 DAYS (6 MONTHS) AFTER THE DEFENDANT DISCOVERS OR
OR SHOULD HAVE DISCOVERED THAT THE JUDGMENT WAS ENTERED AGAINST THE DEFENDANT.
